# Design: VisuDevGraph IR (unified analysis graph)

<!-- generated by /feature-intake on 2026-07-07 -->

## Problem & Intent

`BlueprintDocument` is today a flat **report** model: `routes[]`, `facts[]`, `concepts[]`, `findings[]`, `securityMatrix[]`. Each slice is useful for UI, but there is no first-class **analysis graph** that links evidence → nodes → edges → scopes.

App Flow already uses `AnalysisGraph` (nodes/edges/evidence/issues). Blueprint needs an equivalent **VisuDevGraph** so both domains can converge on a shared graph IR over time.

**Intent:** Introduce `VisuDevGraph` as the canonical analysis model; keep existing report fields as derived/backward-compatible views until later slices retire them.

## Non-Goals

- Replacing Route Blueprint Canvas or Security Matrix UI in v0.1
- AppFlow → VisuDevGraph mapping (slice 5)
- Execution-order graph driving pipeline template (slice 4)
- Security matrix derived purely from graph (slice 6)
- Findings coupled to expected controls via graph (slice 7)
- AST/SWC parser upgrade (slice 8, P2)
- Breaking KV blueprint format (`graph` is additive optional field)
- Cross-function imports or frontend graph rendering

## Assumptions

- Fact extractors remain regex/line-based (v1)
- Route scopes = one subgraph per `api-route` (method + path)
- `ConceptState` semantics map 1:1 to `DetectionState` for graph nodes
- GitHub Edge + Local Runner share `analyzeFromFileEntries()` pipeline

## Options Considered

### Option A: Extend `routes[].pipeline` only (rejected)

- Minimal change, but pipeline stays a linear template — no shared IR with AppFlow, no reusable evidence graph.

### Option B: VisuDevGraph alongside report fields (recommended)

- Add `graph?: VisuDevGraph` to `BlueprintDocument`
- Mapper: `CodeFact[]` + `RouteScope[]` → graph
- Pros: additive, ponytail-friendly, enables incremental slice delivery
- Cons: temporary duplication (graph + routes/matrix)

### Option C: YAGNI — defer graph, enrich facts metadata (deferred)

- Cheaper short-term, but blocks AppFlow/Blueprint convergence and graph-derived security matrix.

## Decision

**Chosen:** Option B — VisuDevGraph DTO + fact mapper in analyzer module; report fields unchanged for UI v1.

## Cross-Domain Sign-Off

| Domain          | Status | Note                                      |
| --------------- | ------ | ----------------------------------------- |
| KISS            | ✅     | v0.1 mapper is fact-kind rules only       |
| SOLID           | ✅     | DTO / mapper / pipeline separated         |
| DRY             | ⚠️     | Dual IR until slices 4–7 derive views     |
| Security        | ✅     | Graph is analysis output, no new exposure |
| UI/UX           | ✅     | No UI change in slice 1–2                 |
| Scaling         | ✅     | Same file limit as blueprint pipeline     |
| Testability     | ✅     | Deno unit on mapper + existing extractors |
| Maintainability | ✅     | Aligns naming with AnalysisGraph pattern  |

## Runtime matrix

| Slice                              | GitHub (Edge) | Local (Runner)     | UI          |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------- | ------------------ | ----------- |
| 1 DTO + optional graph on document | ✅            | ✅ shared pipeline | —           |
| 2 Facts → graph mapper             | ✅            | ✅                 | —           |
| 3 Route scopes as subgraphs        | ✅            | ✅                 | —           |
| 4 Execution graph from edges       | ✅            | ✅                 | deferred    |
| 5 AppFlow AnalysisGraph mapping    | ✅            | partial            | —           |
| 6 Security matrix from graph       | ✅            | ✅                 | deferred    |
| 7 Findings + expected controls     | ✅            | ✅                 | deferred    |
| 8 AST upgrade                      | —             | —                  | P2 deferred |

## Implementation Sketch

```
src/supabase/functions/visudev-analyzer/module/
  dto/graph/visudev-graph.dto.ts          # VisuDevGraph IR types
  dto/blueprint/blueprint-document.dto.ts # graph?: VisuDevGraph
  blueprint/graph/fact-graph.mapper.ts    # CodeFact[] → VisuDevGraph
  blueprint/graph/fact-graph.mapper.test.ts
  blueprint/services/blueprint-pipeline.service.ts  # attach graph after facts

Mapping rules (v0.1):
  every fact        → VisuDevEvidence
  api-route         → route node
  db-read/db-write  → table node + reads/writes edge from route
  validation facts  → validation node + validates edge
  auth facts        → auth node + authenticates edge
  external-api-call → external_api node + calls edge
  RouteScope        → VisuDevScope kind "route"

Deferred:
  graph.findings[] populated from policy engine (slice 7)
  pipeline template from edge traversal (slice 4)
  frontend mirror types + canvas from graph (later)
```

## Open Questions

- [ ] When to deprecate `routes[].pipeline` in favor of graph traversal — after slice 4
- [ ] Shared base types between AnalysisGraph and VisuDevGraph — slice 5

## Ready for /implement

YES — slices 1–2 (DTO + fact mapper)
